In this chart Jupiter+D ragon+ Moon indicates a noble hearted
native. But because of misdeeds in the previous birth at the
Sanctum Sanctorum of a Divine Concept-Mercury is sitting
behind Dragon Head, due to fear. According to Degrees Mars
is in front of Dragon Head. Mercury is intellect (Buddhi)and
Dragon Head indicates a sort of hallucination, fearfulness and
therefore mars the power is perplexed. Marriage is not possible.
till the native's 40th year age.
In Nadi system we are considering Mercury as the only planet
for eduction. but varieties of educational aspects are to be
deduced keeping in view it's supporting planets. Without aspect
ofJupiter towards Mercury, improvements, propsperity or
achievements in educational lines cannot be achieved. The 2nd,
